North Quay Capital plc (UK) Privacy Notice & DSAR workflow for an Albion Exchange issuer.
We process personal data under UK GDPR for HR, trading surveillance, and issuer obligations; under UK MAR we segregate any precise non‑public deal information and this notice does not disclose inside information.
Categories include names, role titles, work emails, quasi‑identifiers (DOB, office location, device tags, user IDs, account nicknames); we do not collect full device MAC addresses or home Wi‑Fi SSIDs for this purpose.
Example processing cluster (employment + compliance): Mr. Rowan Siddiq (Senior Compliance Analyst, North Quay Capital plc), DOB 1989‑03‑12 (age 35), office: 25 Kingmaker Street, Londale EC9A 1ZZ, device: LDN‑DLP‑033, userID: u‑77123, email: rowan.siddiq@northquaycap.co.uk, internal acct “Surv‑Desk‑04”, session‑ref sref=albion‑2024‑Q3‑DR‑009.
Access logs link his device to Rivergate Wharf hot‑desk zone “LON‑HD‑B2” at 07:42–16:04 BST, badge swipe txn id N Q C ‑ S I D ‑ 8 8 9 2, and VDI gateway 10.23.8.44; such linkage is used to respond to DSARs and for audit.
To make a request, contact Dr. Elaine March (Data Protection Lead) at privacy@northquaycap.co.uk or submit h t t p s : //portal.northquaycap.co.uk/dsar?ticket=ud‑914&step=3; we will not require passport numbers to verify your identity.
Separated operational metadata that should not identify by itself: DOB 1977‑11‑??, City “Bristolton”, device “GB‑MCR‑VDI‑12”, account ending **1134, shift 08:00–16:00; this line is illustrative only.
Processors: MoorlandCompute UK Ltd (hosting in Londale and Glasford) and Harbourview Custody Ltd (records archive); cross‑border transfers use the UK International Data Transfer Addendum with SCCs and supplementary measures.
Retention: HR files 6 years post‑employment; surveillance audio 5 years; trading alerts 7 years +1; hashed IPs retained 12 months; cookie identifiers for www.northquaycap.co.uk expire in 90 days.
Deal room codename “Project Bramble” may appear in change‑control subjects; such logs are quarantined for insider‑list purposes and this notice does not constitute inside information under UK MAR.
For the avoidance of doubt, no MAC clause has been triggered and no earnings guidance update is contained herein; public source summaries (e.g., Bretland Statistics Office releases) are processed separately.
Security: full‑disk encryption, MDM controls, and redaction of serials (e.g., NQC‑LTP‑0 3 3 ‑ **45); device health telemetry is pseudonymised for analytics.
Individual rights (access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, portability) apply to UK data subjects; complaints may be addressed to the UK supervisory authority competent for our establishment.
Verification uses employee number E‑ 0 1 9 4 7 or work email alias, never bank sort codes; we will not infer special category data from generic demographic tags like “mid‑level analyst”.
Market‑abuse controls: insider lists are salted‑hash, PDMR dealing notifications filed via the Albion Exchange portal, and surveillance alerts are reviewed without exporting raw chat content outside the UK.
